communityHub.title: Explore Our Device Community On Telegram
communityHub.summary: One shared Telegram space for release posts, screenshots, help requests, and day-to-day discussion around the Nothing Phone 2a and 2a Plus.
highlights: Keeps users, maintainers, testers, and newcomers in the same device community.
Gives new users one obvious place to find updates, flashing help, and screenshots.
Separates the wider chat from the per-ROM release posts linked throughout the site.

gcamEntries.name: SGCam
gcamEntries.summary: Recommended SGCam setup for both pacman and pacmanpro, with the APK and matching XML config linked together so users can get the intended result quickly.

sourceChanges.title: Framework and SystemUI
sourceChanges.summary: Recent framework-side cleanup focused on making the Android 16 base feel cleaner, quicker, and easier to read.
items: Quick settings and notification spacing were cleaned up for better balance.
App open and return transitions were tightened so the UI feels quicker without becoming harsh.
Lockscreen contrast was tuned to stay readable on brighter wallpapers.

sourceChanges.title: Device Tree and Vendor
sourceChanges.summary: Device tree and vendor cleanup reduced duplicated work between the Nothing Phone 2a and 2a Plus bring-up.
items: Common overlays and properties were aligned across both variants.
Vendor-side adjustments were grouped so future device work is easier to follow.
Variant-specific changes still stay easy to separate when pacman and pacmanpro need different handling.

sourceChanges.title: Kernel and Thermal
sourceChanges.summary: Kernel and thermal work is still summarized in plain language instead of dropping raw commit lists on users.
items: Thermal notes stay readable for users while still being useful to testers.
Kernel sync notes are short, specific, and easy to scan before flashing.
There is room to follow up quickly when hotfixes or small cleanups land.

builderUpdates.title: Per-ROM release tracking is now the default layout
builderUpdates.summary: Each ROM now has its own section for version info, device targets, Telegram links, and release notes instead of sharing one mixed grid.

builderUpdates.title: Every tracked ROM now covers pacman and pacmanpro
builderUpdates.summary: The full current lineup supports both Nothing Phone 2a (pacman) and Nothing Phone 2a Plus (pacmanpro), so the device matrix stays aligned across the hub.

builderUpdates.title: The site is ready for more ROMs and more release tracks
builderUpdates.summary: The structure is already set up for more ROMs, more devices, and more release metadata without rebuilding the homepage.

supportMatrix.name: Nothing Phone 2a
supportMatrix.summary: Every ROM currently listed in the directory supports pacman, with release links and notes tracked inside each ROM section.

supportMatrix.name: Nothing Phone 2a Plus
supportMatrix.summary: Every ROM currently listed in the directory also supports pacmanpro, keeping the 2a Plus on the same public release map.

expansionCards.title: Add More ROMs
expansionCards.summary: New ROMs can be added without rebuilding the homepage or touching the layout system.

expansionCards.title: Map Release Links
expansionCards.summary: Telegram release posts can be attached per ROM or per device build without changing the page structure.

expansionCards.title: Extend the Workflow
expansionCards.summary: The current setup is ready for JSON feeds, Git-based data, or a lightweight maintainer workflow when needed.
